title: [Moonsu] Cherry Blossom (Advancements Plaques)
description: Replaces the original design with something more simple but elegantly flowered.
body:
# Enjoy the new redesign of the progress bar with a flowery and elegant pink touch!
![Cherry Blossom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1982abfa540e7e129bb388d82878322753eccaed.png)

### Link Mod:[Advancements Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)
### **Can i use for my Modpack?**
**Sure! no problem, but I would appreciate if you could leave credits.**

### **_Any questions or suggestions can be left in the Official Discord: [Discord!](https://discord.gg/bGfyh9EXrT)_**
